title: feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
author: Rohith-Saran

findings.description: Unresolved Git merge conflict markers (<<<<<<< HEAD, =======, >>>>>>>) present in backend/cmd/server.go, backend/pkg/config/config.go, and backend/pkg/headlampconfig/headlampConfig.go. The Go compiler will reject these files. Must rebase and resolve conflicts.
Commit title uses Conventional Commits format ('feat: ...') instead of project convention 'area: Component: Description'.
External links JSON parsed on every /config request. Parsing at startup and failing fast would surface misconfiguration earlier.

Sidebar group icon ('mdi:link-variant') and per-link fallback icon ('mdi:link') are hardcoded. ExternalLink already has an optional icon field; consider documenting or making the group icon configurable.
Redux slice, Storybook fixtures, and unit test are well-structured. Frontend correctly guards against empty externalLinks array before rendering the sidebar group.
